svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="architecture" name="Romanian Company Analytics Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="4075" dy="1338" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F2937;align=center;" value="Romanian Company Analytics Platform" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="760" x="270" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sources" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DBEAFE;strokeColor=#2563EB;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1E3A8A;" value="Romanian Government APIs<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">ONRC / MFinante / data.gov.ro API resources</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="310" x="-40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="monthly_note" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#EA580C;fontSize=13;fontColor=#7C2D12;" value="AWS monthly auto ingestion<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">EventBridge triggers ECS Fargate once per month</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="260" x="990" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEDD5;strokeColor=#EA580C;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7C2D12;" value="AWS ECS Fargate Ingestion<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">Docker container running Python batch job</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="320" x="515" y="235" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3d;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#D1FAE5;strokeColor=#059669;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#064E3B;" value="AWS S3 Raw Data Lake<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">raw_v2 snapshots and source metadata</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="515" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="databricks_group" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#FEF2F2;strokeColor=#DC2626;fontColor=#7F1D1D;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="ELT Layer: Databricks + Unity Catalog" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="360" x="500" y="565" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adapter" parent="databricks_group" style="shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEE2E2;strokeColor=#DC2626;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="S3 Access Adapter<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">Unity Catalog external location + storage credential</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="55" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bronze" parent="databricks_group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE4E6;strokeColor=#E11D48;fontSize=13;" value="Bronze Layer<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">source-shaped Delta tables</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="50" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="silver" parent="databricks_group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF1F2;strokeColor=#E11D48;fontSize=13;" value="Silver Layer<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">normalized relational model</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="50" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gold" parent="databricks_group" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E11D48;fontSize=13;" value="Gold Layer<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">BI-ready tables and views</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="50" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_adapter_bronze" edge="1" parent="databricks_group" source="adapter" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#DC2626;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="bronze" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_bronze_silver" edge="1" parent="databricks_group" source="bronze" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#DC2626;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="silver" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_silver_gold" edge="1" parent="databricks_group" source="silver" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#DC2626;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="gold" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="job_note" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8FAFC;strokeColor=#64748B;fontSize=13;fontColor=#334155;" value="Databricks Job Pipeline<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">Bronze layer -> Silver layer -> Gold layer</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="290" x="200" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="powerbi" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE7F3;strokeColor=#DB2777;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#831843;" value="Power BI / Databricks<br><font style="font-size: 12px;">dashboards and semantic model</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="320" x="520" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_sources_ecs" edge="1" parent="1" source="sources" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=12;" target="ecs" value="discover and download resources"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0612" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1" as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="390" y="288" /> <mxPoint x="390" y="288" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_note_ecs" edge="1" parent="1" source="monthly_note" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#64748B;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=11;" target="ecs" value="once a month"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_ecs_s3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=12;" target="s3" value="uploads raw files"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_s3_adapter" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=12;" target="adapter" value="S3 read path"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_gold_powerbi" edge="1" parent="1" source="gold" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=12;" target="powerbi" value="analytics consumption"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
